# zendesk_organization (Resource)

Manages a Zendesk organization.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name for the organization.

### Optional

- `details` (String) Any details about the organization, such as the address.
- `domain_names` (Set of String) Domain names associated with this organization.
- `external_id` (String) A unique external id to associate the organization with an external record.
- `group_id` (Number) New tickets from users in this organization are automatically put in this group.
- `notes` (String) Any notes you have about the organization.
- `organization_fields` (Map of String) Custom organization field values, keyed by field key. Values are sent as strings.
- `shared_comments` (Boolean) Whether end users in this organization can comment on each other's tickets.
- `shared_tickets` (Boolean) Whether end users in this organization can see each other's tickets.
- `tags` (Set of String) The tags of the organization. Note: Zendesk lowercases tags.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)
- `url` (String)
